name: @gusevp/prisma-where-required
description: Make certain fields required in where clause for Prisma 7
author: GusevP

scripts.generate:typeTestFile: ts-node tests/generateTypeTestFile.ts --level basic && ts-node tests/generateTypeTestFile.ts --level relations && ts-node tests/generateTypeTestFile.ts --level includes
scripts.test:basic: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.basic.prisma && tsc tests/type.basic.test.ts --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck
scripts.test:relations: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && tsc tests/type.relations.test.ts --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck
scripts.test:includes: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.includes.prisma && tsc tests/type.includes.test.ts --noEmit --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck
scripts.test: npm run test:basic && npm run test:relations && npm run test:includes
